message:
feat(config): add context_warning_threshold and project-scoped alert overrides

Add ContextWarningThreshold (default 75%) to AlertsConfig for warning when
agent context usage is high. Introduce ProjectAlerts struct with pointer
fields to distinguish unset from explicit zero/false, enabling per-project
alert overrides via MergeConfig. Extend GetValue, Validate, Diff, and Print
to cover all alert fields (mail_backlog_threshold, bead_stale_hours,
context_warning_threshold, resolved_prune_minutes). LoadMerged now returns
an error on invalid global config instead of silently falling back to
defaults.

Tests: coverage_boost_test validates all new GetValue paths and expanded
negative-value validation (6 errors). extra_test adds LoadMerged invalid
global config error path and three MergeConfig_ProjectAlerts cases for
explicit-false override, partial override preservation, and independent
threshold override.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
